## AI Media Buyer By Creatify

Launching today

Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily. [...] Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily.

Every media buyer knows the ritual: five dashboards, three hours of reports, still guessing what to do next. Creatify AI Media Buyer connects to your Meta, Google, AppLovin and TikTok ad accounts and does what a human buyer does audits campaigns, finds spend that's quietly bleeding, spots what's scaling, and acts on it. It generates new creatives from your actual winners and launches them, all through chat. And it remembers your account history, so its recommendations compound over time.

## PreviousCreatifyLaunches

Creatify Product Video

Creatify Product VideoROAS-focused AI product video builder

Launched on May 5th, 2025 [...] What impressed me most about AI Media Buyer is that it goes far beyond dashboards. It helps turn data into actionable decisions. From performance analysis and strategy recommendations to creative generation and optimization, it feels like a true AI co-worker rather than just another AI tool.

I’ve been fortunate to see this product evolve from the early days, helping refine the ads strategies behind it. Today, the quality of its recommendations is genuinely impressive, and it’s already become part of our internal workflow.

I truly believe AI Media Buyer is changing how paid advertising gets done. The future isn’t AI replacing marketers—it’s AI and marketers making better decisions together.

Huge congratulations to the Creatify team on the launch! 🚀

Review Adwin?

Adwin is highly praised for its AI-driven approach to managing Google Ads, making it accessible for both beginners and experts. Users appreciate its ease of use, seamless integration with Google's platform, and real-time updates that allow for ongoing optimization. The platform's ability to automate ad creation and optimize based on performance data is particularly valued, saving users time and effort while maximizing ROI. Adwin's user-friendly onboarding and conversion tracking features are also highlighted as significant advantages for small businesses and freelancers.

results.title: OTTO GOOGLE ADS Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Image 8: Nitin Bhardwaj

Nitin Bhardwaj

•1 review

I’ve tried multiple Google Ads tools, but OTTO Google Ads stands out as a true time-saver. The AI-driven automation takes the guesswork out of campaign setup—automatically selecting keywords, structuring ad groups, and generating compelling ad copy in minutes. What I love most: ✅ Effortless Setup – Just connect your website, and OTTO handles the heavy lifting. ✅ AI-Powered Optimization – No more manual tweaks; OTTO ensures ad performance is always improving. ✅ Saves Time & Boosts ROI – Perfect for marketers and business owners who want results without spending hours in Ads Manager. If you run Google Ads and want better results with less effort, OTTO is a must-try. Kudos to the team for building such a powerful tool! 🔥

#### What's great [...] Love hearing that, Liz! OTTO’s all about making ads smarter and saving you serious time. Can’t wait to see what you do with it. Keep us posted!
